title: Perago RTGS STP User Administration
checks: Verify Chief Security Officer available for overall system security
Confirm Chief Security Officer registers application Administrators
Check Treasury Department Head as business owner
Confirm user approved by Treasury Department
Verify administrator registered by Chief Security Officer
Validate role and authorization levels defined
recommended_actions: Access hierarchy: Chief Security Officer registers Administrators
Access hierarchy: Administrators register and manage Users
Access hierarchy: Users receive application-specific access
Access hierarchy: Administrators may assign admin rights to other users
User registration procedure: Login to Perago RTGS as Administrator
User registration procedure: Navigate to: User Administration → Maintain Users
User registration procedure: Select username from dropdown (pre-registered by perago:rtgs administrator)
User registration procedure: Click Add
User registration procedure: Capture personal details
User registration procedure: Link user to business area (if required)
User registration procedure: Configure logon permissions
User registration procedure: Modify daily schedule if different from default
User registration procedure: Assign roles to user
User registration procedure: Configure function authorization levels
User registration procedure: Enter change reason
User registration procedure: Click Save
User registration procedure: Submit for processing and authorization
Logon permissions configuration parameters: application_selection, access_type (Administrator or User), effective_date, revoke_date
Logon permissions configuration rules: Administrator and User access are mutually exclusive
Function authorization levels configuration: capture_rights, first_authorization_level, second_authorization_level, value_constraints
User modification: Click Edit icon for selected user
User modification: Modify required fields
User modification: Enter change reason
User modification: Click Save
User modification: Submit for processing and authorization
User revocation: Click Revoke icon for selected user
User revocation: System validates existing permissions
User revocation: Enter revocation reason
User revocation: Click Save
User revocation rules: Revoked users cannot be reactivated
Access reset procedure for user locked after three failed login attempts: Navigate to: Reset User Access
Access reset procedure: Select user from dropdown (revoked users only)
Access reset procedure: Enter change reason
Access reset procedure: Submit for processing and authorization
Password reset procedure: Navigate to: Reset User Password
Password reset procedure: Select user from dropdown
Password reset procedure: Enter initial password
Password reset procedure: Enter change reason
Password reset procedure: Submit
Password reset rules: User forced to change password on first login
Verification: User can log in successfully
Verification: Assigned access levels correct
Verification: Authorization constraints enforced
Verification: Daily schedule restrictions applied
Verification: Audit trail entries created
notes: Critical financial system requiring highest security standards
Users inherit permissions from assigned roles
User-level constraints override role-level constraints
When multiple roles exist, the highest constraint value applies
Regular access reviews are mandatory
Temporary passwords should follow complexity requirements
Security controls: Three-tier authorization model
Security controls: Function-level authorization constraints
Security controls: Daily schedule enforcement
Security controls: Automatic account lockout after failed attempts
Security controls: Full audit trail for all changes
Escalation path Level 1: System Administrator (routine user administration)
Escalation path Level 2: Chief Security Officer (security-related issues)
Escalation path Level 3: Treasury Management (business impact)
Escalation path Level 4: Head ICT (system-wide or critical incidents)
Documentation: User registration forms
Documentation: Authorization matrices
Documentation: Change request records
Documentation: Security incident logs
Documentation: Access review reports
Compliance requirements: RTGS regulatory requirements
Compliance requirements: Financial system access controls
Compliance requirements: Segregation of duties enforcement
Compliance requirements: Regular audit compliance
